programme.title: World Of Watersports Ep303: Profile of Professional Kayaker Adrian Mattern
programme.desc: Extreme Kayaking is a way of life for Germany's Adrian Mattern. The attraction for Adrian is to get to know new places, cultures and people on every expedition, as well as mastering the extreme mental and physical challenges. Adrian's always looking for new spots on the world map: new rivers and waterfalls, new techniques and styles and he's always thinking "outside the box".

programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep106: Shark Divers Part 1
programme.desc: Shark divers study, photograph and interact with some of the most terrifying creatures on earth. This group of skilled professionals routinely work with sharks out in the wild and in aquariums. Shark Divers focuses on this diverse and eclectic dive group…each with different motives in their fascinating fields.

programme.title: Airtime Ep32: The Titans of Windsurfing - Maui, Hawaii
programme.desc: Big-wave windsurfing history catches up with the present as European Champion Tristan Boxford takes us inside the progression of the sport. On Maui, Hawaii, meet the legends; hear how it all started and where it's going. Hang out with pioneers like Robby Naish, Jason Polakow, the Angulo brothers, as well as windsurfing's present rulers Levi Siver, Kauli Seadi and Daida Moreno. From board-shaping to riding big waves at Jaws and Hookipa, learn about the birthplace of a sport.

programme.title: Sports Adventure Ep613: Whitewater Kayaking Africa’s Zambezi River
programme.desc: World-renowned kayaker Steve Fisher brings together a crew of big-water pros to experience the force of Africa’s mighty Zambezi River at record levels. Steeped in the brotherhood of kayaking, Fisher, and his fellow paddlers, run head-on into some of the most radical rapids ever recorded

programme.title: Hot Water Ep121: F1H2O Powerboat World Championship Tour
programme.desc: Round 2 from Portimao, Portugal, where the mighty Atlantic meets the graceful Arade River, in a country with an illustrious and glorious maritime history, where the waves crash and the sprays soar, the second round of the UIM F1H2O season kicks off.

programme.title: Facing Waves Ep411: Tahiti
programme.desc: Host Nikki Gregg explores the turquoise waters and breathtaking tropical islands of French Polynesia on her stand-up paddleboard.

programme.title: World Of Watersports Ep303: Profile of Professional Kayaker Adrian Mattern
programme.desc: Extreme Kayaking is a way of life for Germany's Adrian Mattern. The attraction for Adrian is to get to know new places, cultures and people on every expedition, as well as mastering the extreme mental and physical challenges. Adrian's always looking for new spots on the world map: new rivers and waterfalls, new techniques and styles and he's always thinking "outside the box".

programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep106: Shark Divers Part 1
programme.desc: Shark divers study, photograph and interact with some of the most terrifying creatures on earth. This group of skilled professionals routinely work with sharks out in the wild and in aquariums. Shark Divers focuses on this diverse and eclectic dive group…each with different motives in their fascinating fields.

programme.title: Volcom Presents: Psychic Migrations - Isla De Algas
programme.desc: To celebrate the release of ‘Psychic Migrations’, director Ryan Thomas revives a trip that didn’t make it into the original film. In this edit from the cutting room floor, ISLA DE ALGAS, Ryan Burch and Andrew Doheny brave the sea, walk a deserted island, and rip the walls of a cold right hander.

programme.title: Volcom Presents: Tweakin' On Boards With Ryan Burch
programme.desc: Tweakin’ on Boards was shot in 2009. Seems like a second ago and forever ago. Truth is it’s both. As a surfer and filmmaker, Burch isn’t content complaining everything's already been done. Says fellow surfer Cyrus Sutton, “He needs to FEEL history for himself.” This film is that and more.

programme.title: Arc’teryx Presents: Happy Recluse
programme.desc: For many years Pete Devries and Jeremy Koreski have been on a mission to surf the best waves Vancouver Island has to offer. In particular, they return again and over to a wave with potential for a legendary session. In the process, Pete tells of his life as a ”Happy Recluse," at home in cold water.

programme.title: Roxy Presents: New Colors
programme.desc: Faced with the winter waters of Norway, four female professional surfers step out of their comfort zone, push their boundaries and redefine their approach to surfing. Beyond competition sites, they reconnect with the pleasure of sharing their passion through a unique cold water experience.

programme.title: Volcom Presents: Lobotomy
programme.desc: Set to the music of Frankie and the Witch Fingers, LOBOTOMY offers nonstop surf action. This relentless cinematic climax will leave surf fanatics in a puddle of drool. File under instant classic. Featuring Yago Dora, Jack Robinson, Noa Deane, Ozzie Wright, Balaram Stack and Ryan Burch.

programme.title: Nazaré
programme.desc: Nazaré is a giant wave in Portugal. This footage was captured October 29, 2020, during one of the biggest swells in history. On this day, the German surfer, Sebastian Steudtner, rode a 26-meter wave. This event set new Guinness World Records and established Nazaré as a global surf destination.

programme.title: [object Object]
programme.desc: [object Object]

programme.title: Kaiwi Winds
programme.desc: [object Object]

programme.title: Volcom Presents: XO - Coco Ho
programme.desc: Step into the world of pro surfer Coco Ho. Raised on Oahu’s North Shore, the film explores how Ho got started in the water, her surfing family history, and the ups and downs of the Championship Tour. Featuring brother Mason Ho, father Michael Ho, and surfers John John Florence and Stephanie Gilmore.

programme.title: [object Object]
programme.desc: [object Object]

programme.title: Volcom Presents: The Backyard
programme.desc: At Pipeline there is flora, fauna, ocean and stone. Volcom Stone. At this point, the Volcom house is practically part of the reef. Between the team, the family, the legacy, the peanut gallery, the respect, the Pipe Pro and the barbecues, you’d be hard pressed not to notice Volcom on the North Shore.

programme.title: Missle 3
programme.desc: [object Object]

programme.title: Volcom Presents: Telo Menta Uber Jam
programme.desc: This film is what happens when you jam a bunch of rowdy surfers together for a two-week boat trip in the Mentawais. Perfect waves and incredible footage. Featuring the Volcom Surf team: Yago Dora, Ozzie Wright, Mitch Coleborn, Pat Schmidt, Charly Quivront, and Ryan Burch.

programme.title: Billabong Presents: The Cape
programme.desc: What happens when good winds, good weather, and a solid swell come together along one of the rawest stretches of coastline on the planet? You don't stop. Surfers Taj Burrow, Shaun Manners, Jaleesa Vincent, and Matt Bromley test their staying power on this Adventure Division strike mission.

programme.title: South Beach Classics
programme.desc: Ted, being the original character he is, charmed and negotiated his way around the Midwest, the Northeast, and throughout the Central and Southern American states, buying and selling Classic Cars in the only way he knows how: by haggling and wheeling and dealing.

programme.title: South Beach Classics
programme.desc: Need a classic car? If you're in Miami, where old-time autos fit in perfectly with the city's glitz and glamour, Ted Vernon is the man to see. The no-nonsense, gregarious Long Islander runs Florida's largest classic car dealership, where he buys, sells, trades and exchanges unique cars from a lot that houses more than 300 of them. His outgoing personality meshes seamlessly with the colourful collectibles he moves each day, helped by an eclectic shop crew affectionately dubbed `the gargoyles'.

programme.title: Supercars

programme.title: Supercars

programme.title: Put Your Car On TV

programme.title: Put Your Car On TV

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.desc: The most important current trends at the iMOT motorcycle show in Munich, Germany: big enduro bikes, city scooters and affordable motorcycles. And: BMW presents their brand new Maxi-Scooters, with which the market leader in 16 countries intends to dominate the worldwide scooter market as well.

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.desc: The BMW Enduro Park Hechlingen in Bavaria offers off-road driving pleasure both for beginners and pros alike on 26 hectares. We take a look at what this exciting place has to offer for enduro enthusiasts. Also: what does the inexpensive Hyosung ST 700 i from South Korea have to offer? And: the big-wheeled scooter from Taiwan, the Kymco People GT 300i.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Porsche's 911 GTS closed the gap between the S and the GT3 in their sports car model range. Also: the Roding Roadster, a handcrafted lightweight sports car with technology by BMW at its core.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Audi R8 Spyder is the most extreme convertible by the German brand. Also: the Ferrari California T scores with Italian passion and elegant lines. And: AMG's GT C Roadster with its roaring sound is a real bad boy with a touch of luxury.

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.desc: Suzuki's all-rounder flagship, the V-Strom, underwent a rejuvenation treatment. Will the new V-Strom 650 be able to surpass its versatile predecessors? Also: does the use of carbon make sense in the manufacturing of motorcycles? And: a bike tour on the Deutsche Alpenstraße, the German Alpine Road, in the footsteps of Bavaria's fairy tale king Ludwig II.

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.desc: The big KTM 990 Adventure is Austria’s answer to BMW's bestselling R 1200 GS. Is KTM's allrounder for streets, gravel roads and long distance travels a worthy opponent for the dominating Bavarian bike? Also: travel enduros are put to the test as we accompany two German adventurers on their 31-day, 5800-kilometre bike tour through Thailand, Laos and Cambodia.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Audi RS7 Performance's V8 engine propels this limousine to a top speed of more than 300 km/h. Also: the Maserati Ghibli combines Italian elegance with impressive performance. And: a look at the second generation Porsche Panamera.

programme.title: A Day At DIBS
programme.desc: Dubai International Boat Show, the most trusted and established marine industry exhibition in the Middle East. Despite misconceptions claiming luxury yachts to be the main attraction in this event, the DIBS offer a much wider variety of expositions on nautical news, sports and lifestyle. It differs from other shows as it has a more exclusive clientele and many professionals of this world are yearning to come.You will adventure into one of Dubai’s most prestigious shows featuring the latest releases of yachts and boats from both local and international builders together with the innovations in marine equipment and accessories.Discover all its secret gems with Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Speed Catamarans GC32 - Preview
programme.desc: Since it was first set up back in 2014, the GC32 Racing Tour has become one of the most sought after for those who enjoy sailing at its finest and fastest. The 2021’s season again proved why the world’s top professional and amateurs love this tour!After a challenging 2020, when the Tour was cancelled, it finally returned better than ever and made 2021 a year to remember. Through the season, the four stops offered nail-biting action in breath taking venues that brought the best out of these dynamic and fast one design foiling catamarans.The level of expectation and the anticipation was extremely high when the owner-driver and commercially-backed professional teams were about to hit again the water and both the organizers and the participants proved that it was worth waiting for the comeback. So let’s remember the most notable moments of what was a fascinating season full of top-level sailing battles in some crystal clear blue waters.

programme.title: City of Vultures 2
programme.desc: A gangster makes moves to take over the Southside of Chicago, but the police are closing in as street violence escalates to devastating levels.

programme.title: City of Vultures 3
programme.desc: Richard joins in the drug trade, as advocates for reform urge him to change. G attempts to raise his son on Chicago's violent south side.

programme.title: A Gun for Jennifer
programme.desc: A woman comes to New York City from Ohio to escape an abusive husband and gets entangled with murderous female vigilantes who prey on abusive men.

programme.title: Dirty Conscience
programme.desc: A cop thriller from Chile.Two young police recruits are assigned a tough, decorated Officer to train them. It quickly becomes clear that their new boss is involved with serious corruption. At first the two young cops try to look the other way. But as their boss begins to doubt their loyalty, the two recruits must choose between saving their honor and their careers--before their boss has them killed.

programme.title: Satan Claus
programme.desc: With the clock ticking and the body count rising, Homicide Detective Timothy Reynolds reluctantly volunteers to assist his former partner, Detective Alan Fryer, with the investigation to a slew of grisly murders left behind by a mission orientated killer during the Christmas holidays.

programme.title: Chain of Souls
programme.desc: When a naive aspiring actress from Podunk, Texas disappears in Los Angeles, her protective sister comes looking for her. The clues lead her to a diabolical cult masquerading as a theater group and the fight of her life.

programme.title: Dropped - S05:E03 - Choke Point
programme.desc: The terrain begins to change as the Keefer brothers are forced to pick their way downstream. The landscape tightens it's grip and funnels the brothers to a geographic choke point where both predator and prey gather.

programme.title: Dropped - S05:E04 - Bone Weary
programme.desc: The Keefer brothers take shelter in a small pine outcropping as a winter storm sets siege to the river. Forced to wait out the arctic blast, the brothers try and retain what little energy they have left.

programme.title: Dropped - S05:E05 - Fireside Fortune
programme.desc: Using up the last of their energy, the Keefer brothers make their way down stream in search of their next supply cache. The tide turns as they finally make their way out of the open tundra and into the heart of moose country.

programme.title: Survive the Wild - S01:E05 - Masters of Attack
programme.desc: Carnivores can't just pick their meals off trees. To survive, they have to use every trick they've got to catch food that's just as keen on staying alive as they are. If their prey hides, they have to find it. If it runs, they must chase it. They have to track it if it's hard to pin down and beat it if it fights back. The predator might use its strength for the final blow, but the real effort lies in the strategy.

programme.title: Survive the Wild - S01:E06 - Devious Defenses
programme.desc: Animals can employ a number of different defenses in order to withstand an attack. Some seek safety in herds, some hide in plain sight, some meet aggression with even stronger aggression, and some build fortresses. Whatever the strategy it is clear that animals will do whatever it takes to survive the wild.

programme.title: Life on the Edge - S01:E03 - Engine Trouble
programme.desc: Bad weather in the Aleutians has stranded Charlie Summerville and his construction team at Volcano Bay, while Pat Harvie's old cars are having engine issues.

programme.title: Life on the Edge - S01:E04 - Building a Wilderness Cabin
programme.desc: At Volcano Bay, nerves begin to fray for Charlie Summerville and his team as they embark on constructing the wilderness cabin.

programme.title: Dropped - S05:E01 - Empty Handed
programme.desc: In remote areas, survival is an everyday game. Enter hosts Chris and Casey Keefer as they set out to survive 30 days in the backcountry. Each new day these brothers will pit their skills as hunters, woodsmen, and fishermen against an unforgiving and relentless landscape. DROPPED brings viewers face to face with the harsh reality of only being able to eat what you can kill. A true test of survival. The Keefer brothers put boots to ground as their journey through Alaska begins. Armed with nothing but a couple Glock 20s, the brothers immediately begin their search for their first supply-yielding catch.

programme.title: In Your Arms
programme.desc: The poetic tale of a man with a neurological disorder and the enigmatic nurse persuaded to support him with assisted suicide.

programme.title: Name Me
programme.desc: An adeptly played debut in which a yearning for paternal affection plays out against a background of teenage sexual manipulation.

programme.title: The Postman's White Nights
programme.desc: Quiet drama about the Russian soul, corruption and the postman from Lake Kenozero in northern Russia.

programme.title: The Dreamed Path
programme.desc: After a vacation romance, Kenneth and Theres lose sight of each other. But fate brings them together again 30 years later.

programme.title: Stories from the Sea
programme.desc: This documentary portrays women who embark on a sea voyage thus challenging traditional gender roles just by being there.

programme.title: Johanna Dohnal - Visionary of Feminism
programme.desc: Johanna Dohnal, icon of the Austrian women's movement and first Minister for Women's Affairs, shaped the Alpine Republic like hardly any other.

programme.title: Home Game
programme.desc: Hometowns, neighborhoods, community spirit, energy security and a lot of money are at stake here.

programme.title: Gisela
programme.desc: Authentic, haphazard and unromantic, three residents of a high-rise housing estate search for love, friendship and sexuality.

programme.title: Christmas Evil
programme.desc: A psycho in a Santa suit gets to decide who's been naughty and who's been nice.

programme.desc: When Short gets out of prison and tries to get his life straight, he is faced with temptations and influences of the hood.

programme.desc: From Dream To Reality looks back at the people and the technology of the Apollo era.

programme.desc: Change in the space industry is accelerating.

programme.desc: With a new principal in town, Rhyme and the Chicken Girls must band together to save the dance.

programme.title: On The Ropes
programme.desc: Adrienne discovers the truth behind Sonny's mysterious behavior.

programme.title: On The Ropes
programme.desc: Meet Sonny: straight-A student, loving son, loyal boyfriend… and underground boxer?

programme.title: Stuck
programme.desc: Fiona menaces the teachers and students of Millwood High.

programme.title: Stuck
programme.desc: Fiona decides to make it a good day by being kind to everyone in her life.

programme.title: Chicken Girls
programme.desc: Gemma gives Rhyme a fake ID. TK and Wes hold auditions for their upcoming movie project.

programme.title: Chicken Girls
programme.desc: Ellie gets an unexpected visitor. Rooney has a difficult conversation. Rhyme has a few choice words for Sadie.

programme.title: Running Funny
programme.desc: Michael and Eddie are two broke college graduates who rent an “apartment” from Stan, a cantankerous blind war veteran. As they begin their tumultuous transition into the real world, they quickly discover that finding a job will be more complex than securing their degrees.

programme.title: 1st Bite
programme.desc: Set on a tropical island in Thailand, the strange plight of a beleaguered chef who, while romancing a mysterious woman, discovers the diabolical Zen of cooking. Following a near death escape, he returns to Montreal and falls hard for the woman of his life who unfortunately craves only his cooking but not his loving. Worse still, strange things surfacing around him indicate that his journey to the Far East has deep, divine implications. The stage is set for him to take the 1st bite of true love and end the cycle of suffering for all involved.

programme.title: Making Out
programme.desc: A screenwriter and self-proclaimed hopeless romantic meets a beautiful actress and they decide to act out their ideal love scenarios. When real feelings start to jump off the page and become real will he tell her how he feels? They're in love, probably.

programme.title: Beach Babe Bingo
programme.desc: The water is cool and the girls are hot, what more could you want? Jump in and go for a swim, then wash up for a fun night out because the beach has nothing but sand and babes.

programme.title: Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard meets several members of the 9/11 Truth movement who challenge the official version of events concerning the attack on the U.S.

programme.title: Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Did the late Stanley Meyer figure out a way to run an internal combustion engine on pure water?

programme.title: We Are Golden
programme.desc: Queen’s University is hosting the 2023 and 2024 Vanier Cup Championship and the Gaels have their sights set on the Cup.

programme.title: We Are Golden
programme.desc: The 2023 Gaels look to take back control of this decades-long battle. Legendary Coach Frank Tindall is one of the greatest of all time.

programme.title: We Are Golden
programme.desc: The Gaels embark on an ambitious mission. One of Canada’s most prominent surgeons lead his team to the 1978 Vanier Cup.

programme.title: Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Cryptozoologists who believe pterodactyls, flying dinosaurs extinct some 60 million years ago, are alive and thriving in remote places such as Papua New Guinea.

programme.title: Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: What's going on inside Area 51, America's most carefully guarded secret?

programme.title: Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Did this pop icon and blond bombshell succumb to a drug overdose in 1962 as we've been led to believe or was she killed for 'knowing too much?"

programme.title: Unicorn Hunters
programme.desc: GeneproDX is transforming traditional medicine —bridging Health Tech and AI and providing patients with fast, reliable, and accurate diagnostics. GeneproDX’s patented product, ThyroidPrint, provides highly-accurate diagnosis, resulting in fewer unnecessary surgeries — saving patients from life-altering surgical outcomes.

programme.title: Hot and Sweet
programme.desc: The romantic-comedy tells the story between a pretty boy food truck owner who settles in a spot by the Gangwon beach, and the mysterious and wacky lady he meets.

programme.title: Hot and Sweet
programme.desc: The romantic-comedy tells the story between a pretty boy food truck owner who settles in a spot by the Gangwon beach, and the mysterious and wacky lady he meets.

programme.title: Unicorn Hunters
programme.desc: Far UV creates autonomous disinfection devices that can assist in containing the inevitable emergence of infectious diseases that can be spread by pathogens on surfaces or through the air. It is under contract with NASA to prevent foodborne illness in space flight and works with the US Army.

programme.title: Thirty the Series
programme.desc: Charlie, Bianca and Anna are on their way to see Dalia, who has fallen off the grid since becoming a mum. While Dalia tries to wrangle herself, a sick child and a grumpy husband.

programme.title: Legacy - S02:E15 - Episode 15
programme.desc: Willem attempts to win back Petra’s trust, as two old lovers reunite. Angelique tries to make things right with Elizabeth, but an old proposal sticks in her throat.

programme.title: Legacy - S03:E11 - Episode 11
programme.desc: Petra is quickly reminded that every choice comes with its costs. As Dineo and Felicity square up for a vicious battle, Lexi and Elizabeth are forced to pick sides.

programme.title: Legacy - S03:E12 - Episode 12
programme.desc: Dineo makes a drastic turn in her feud with the Price sisters, shocking even her own lawyer. Petra’s new journey coincides with the arrival of a new senior team member.

programme.title: Legacy - S03:E13 - Episode 13
programme.desc: The Price family divide widens as the court case approaches. Petra finds herself compromised as a colleague tests the line.

programme.title: Legacy - S03:E14 - Episode 14
programme.desc: As Dineo is shredded in court, it seems more and more certain that Felicity will get all that she desires. Mike’s advances make Petra increasingly uncomfortable.

programme.title: Legacy - S03:E15 - Episode 15
programme.desc: With Sims’ help, Petra attempts to smoke out Mike. Dineo convinces herself that what happened with the familiar stranger meant nothing.

programme.title: Legacy - S03:E16 - Episode 16
programme.desc: Petra is drawn ever deeper into her boss’ sexual manipulation. Dineo considers putting Sebastian to rest once and for all.

programme.title: City of Vultures 3
programme.desc: Richard joins in the drug trade, as advocates for reform urge him to change. G attempts to raise his son on Chicago's violent south side.

programme.title: A Gun for Jennifer
programme.desc: A woman comes to New York City from Ohio to escape an abusive husband and gets entangled with murderous female vigilantes who prey on abusive men.

programme.title: A Shot In The Dark
programme.desc: A baby is kidnapped in a Brazilian airport. Years later, the mother lives in Lisbon and works in a strip-tease bar so she can survive. When she is fired, she joins a gang of bank robbers...

programme.title: Alien Rising
programme.desc: A savvy ex-homeland security agent and martial arts expert is forced to a remote island to help the military unlock the secrets of an extraterrestrial technology.

programme.title: The Steel Claw
programme.desc: A disabled ex-Marine returns to WWII Philippines for a hazardous rescue mission, relying on a steel prosthetic hand and local guerrilla allies.

programme.title: Hell's Angels
programme.desc: Two British brothers fly in WWI’s fiercest battles, face betrayal over a lover, and sacrifice everything amid sky-high spectacle and tragedy.

programme.title: Flight
programme.desc: A Marine rookie and his mentor vie for a nurse’s love, battling together in the air and on Nicaraguan battlefields.

programme.title: The Red House
programme.desc: An old man and his sister are concealing a terrible secret from their adopted teen daughter, concerning a hidden abandoned farmhouse, located deep in the woods

programme.title: Captian Kidd
programme.desc: The unhistorical adventures of pirate Captain Kidd revolve around treasure and treachery.

programme.title: Gung Ho
programme.desc: The true story of Carlson's Raiders and their World War II attack on Makin Island

programme.title: All You've Got To Do Is Don't
programme.desc: We all find ourselves in seasons when we feel like we don’t have what it takes, and we don’t know what to do. But don’t be afraid or discouraged, because God isn’t late — He’s working according to His timing. Don’t lose hope, and don’t give up

programme.title: Hold Your Peace
programme.desc: Peace isn’t passive, it’s practiced. Trouble is real, but God has given you everything you need to hold onto peace when life feels overwhelming.

programme.title: Lame Excuses
programme.desc: In “Lame Excuses,” Pastor Robert Madu reminds us that we’ve got to stop making excuses and start walking in the purpose God has for us — because His power is made perfect in our weakness.

programme.title: Don't Let The Attack Distract You
programme.desc: Right when you start to feel some positive momentum in your life, an attack comes out of nowhere. Sound familiar? Pastor Steven uses the parable of the seeds to illustrate what to do when the enemy attacks and how to persevere in your purpose.

programme.title: Don't Forget Where You Come From
programme.desc: Feeling like you don’t have enough? God has given you an inheritance, so don’t let pressure shrink your perspective or make you forget who you are. The God who brought you this far is more than capable of driving out what’s in your way.

programme.title: It's Worth The Dirt
programme.desc: Wondering if you should give up because progress feels slow? Wisdom isn’t choosing what’s easiest, it’s choosing what’s worth it. If you’re tempted to quit because it’s hard, remember: God uses pressure and patience to prepare you for something greater.

programme.desc: In a friendly encounter, César hints to his brother Carlos Raúl that the best with Adriana is yet to come.

programme.title: Te Tengo en Salsa
programme.desc: At the spa, Ninoska warns Francesca that she will get Adriana out of Carlos Raul's life forever.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Gregorio needs to escape with Julia. Camila is denied love, Jeli wants her to admit her feelings for Max and she tells him the reason for her rejection. At the orphanage she talks to Father Tiziano and Mother Isabel about Rosa Blanco; and believes that she has something to do with this affair and that she is El Doliente.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Julia flees to defend herself from Marcos, calls for help and calls Max. Ezequiel, armed, arrives at the abandoned house and confronts Marcos. They argue, Marcos loses his head and it is Ezequiel who shoots and then says it was suicide. Pain in the Aragón's house and Fausto swears he will take justice.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: The psychological warfare and threats of physical aggression from Pablo towards Malena are increasing; Isabel is with them, receiving her share of mistreatment - Claudio does not see the moment when he can make public his relationship with Gertrudis - Omar and his men burst into Lorena's annex in search of Guillermo, whom they already have fully identified.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: Claudio receives a call from Pedro warning him to get ready, because Guillermo has been arrested and there is always the possibility that he will end up confessing. Alfonso and Malena are not willing to play Pablo's game. Alberto and Guillermo face to face again, they look at each other with hatred, each one with his own reasons; the whole truth seems to be about to be discovered.

programme.title: MI MEJOR VERSION
programme.desc: Programa de entretenimiento que ofrece temas variados, noticias frescas y contenido alegre para mantenerte informado y motivado.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Roberto le pide a Astrid que le consiga un trabajo en Mascarada a cambio de no hacer nada contra Max. Camila confiesa a Max que Roberto la chantajea. Luciano y el inspector interrogan a la Madre Isabel y al Padre Tiziano sobre Rosa Blanco y ellos mienten.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila es atropellada por un desconocido que le advierte que deje de buscar a Rosa Blanco. Esto la inquieta y acude a Max pero el le dice que no lo involucre más en este asunto. Todos temen el regreso de Rosa Blanco.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Max y Ezequiel se enfrentan por Camila. Astrid trata de manipular a Roberto para sacarle información a cambio de dinero. Max acusa a Camila de prostituta y decide sacarla de su vida. El regreso de Rosa Blanco es traumático.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Max decide enfrentar a Roberto, y cede a la seducción de Astrid, pero no por amor sino por despecho. Durante una cena familiar, Ezequiel brinda por Octavia, pero expresa su intención de casarse con otra mujer. Camila sabe que su madre regresará.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila no entiende por qué su madre regresa para vengarse y el motivo de tanto odio. Madre Isabel, Padre Tiziano y Elda, guardan un cómplice silencio. Max enfrenta a Roberto y Camila reacciona con celos y rabia.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila miente sobre su relación con Roberto. Max está muy golpeado y esta situación la aprovecha Astrid que se le insinúa mucho, pero él la rechaza. Ezequiel humillando y maltratando a Leandro, su hijo enfermo.

programme.title: 48 Horas de Terror
programme.desc: Mateo un escritor citadino adquiere una casa de campo en donde planea vivir con su esposa y escribir en la tranquilidad del campo, pero no tomo en cuenta las trágicas noticias de los acontecimientos de canibalismo que ocurrieron a manos de sus vecinos quienes solo buscan sacias su hambre.

programme.title: The Juniors y La Formula Imperial
programme.desc: Narra las vidas de 7 adolescentes millonarios que se aventuran a planificar una revolución social, generada por vídeo-escándalos y experimentos médicos, con el objetivo de generar un cambio en la ideología mundial, el conflicto entre las clases sociales y el enfrentamiento con sus muchachas de servicio doméstico.

programme.title: Mi Pequeña Pesadilla
programme.desc: Después de la terrible experiencia y la pérdida de sus amigos, Heather se ve obligada a regresar al Hotel Fear donde Travis se prepara para sus próximas víctimas.

programme.title: Esposa de Vacaciones
programme.desc: Aprovechando la ausencia de su esposa, un hombre se sumerge en las tentaciones que ofrece el ciber espacio y conoce a una mujer casada. Ellos vivirán un romance idílico sin dimensionar las consecuencias.

programme.title: Aute Retrato
programme.desc: Recopilación de los mejores momentos de Luis Eduardo Aute en sus 50 años de carrera musical y artística. Un recorrido por sus distintas facetas creativas y sus bandas sonoras. Toda la vida el artista desvelada por un grupo de testigos, colaboradores y amigos que, a través de sus testimonios, demuestran el impacto que han tenido sus icónicas canciones sobre la actualidad musical.

programme.title: Al Acecho del Leopardo AKA Madrid- México
programme.desc: Durante un viaje por la selva mexicana, tres amigos, Román, Patricia y Lorena son testigos de una matanza de campesinos indígenas. Román graba en vídeo la masacre. El Suavecito, el jefe de los asesinos, se da cuenta y mata a Román y a Patricia. Aprovechando la confusión del tiroteo, Lorena logra escapar con la cámara y el vídeo. En su huida se encuentra con un grupo de enanitos toreros que la llevan hasta la ciudad de México. El Suavecito, que no quiere dejar testigos, la persigue implacablemente hasta una enorme plaza de toros, donde en una danza de la muerte, se escenificará la batalla entre el bien y el mal.

programme.title: Aquel Septiembre
programme.desc: En "Septiembre" la vida de Antonio se ve sacudida con el regreso de Carolina, su mejor amigo a quien no ve desde hace 6 años. Esta vez sus planes cambian, el amor comienza a juega con su corazón mientras Julián le hace descubrir los celos que nunca pensó encontraría. Carolina encuentra en Antonio a su mejor confidente y desahogo, sin sabiendo el daño que le hace al decirle todo lo que siente por Julián y hablando con él sobre su confusión por enamorarse de un amigo. Y es que pobre Antonio está enamorado de Carolina, su mejor amiga.

programme.title: A Bucket of Blood
programme.desc: Un camarero de un café beatnik se convierte en un artista asesino para alimentar su nueva fama.

programme.title: Detour
programme.desc: El viaje de un autoestopista hacia California se convierte en una pesadilla de muerte, chantaje y encuentros fatales con una despiadada femme fatale.

programme.title: Abilene Town
programme.desc: Un sheriff intenta detener los conflictos entre colonos en el Oeste tras la Guerra Civil.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes and The Secret Weapon
programme.desc: Holmes debe burlar a espías nazis y a Moriarty para salvar a un inventor de miras de bombardeo.
